name: Multi 100 Plus
description: Solar lantern that comprises of a solar panel, one lighting point and a mobile phone charger.

taxonomy.sub_category: Multi 100 Plus Updated on January 14, 2024 · Created on October 5, 2018 Multi 100 Plus Solar lantern that comprises of a solar panel, one lighting point and a mobile phone charger. Developed By Niwa Tested By Lighting Global Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Multi 100 Plus includes a polycrystalline silicon solar panel, lithium iron phosphate battery, and six LEDs in circular plastic enclosure lighting points. Special features include: 5 mobile phone adapters, battery and solar charging indicators, Light mode slider DUAL – Charging of solar and DC same time, super-Flex Handle and a rain protection cap. Target SDGs SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $33.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations Niwa - Next Energy Products Ltd. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include d.Light S2 and Sun King Eco . Regions Central Africa, East Africa, South Asia, Southern Africa, West Africa Manufacturing/Building Method Mass produced Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model The product is distributed by Niwa - Next Energy Products Ltd. Battery: Easily replacible with common tools, Lithium iron phosphate, 18650 cylindrical cell, 1500mAh, 3.2V. Lamp: Six LEDs in circular plastic enclosure light points, CRI 86 CCT "Cool" 5000-7000K, wide distribution. Technical Support Available from the manufacturer. Replacement Components Available from the manufacturer.
